title: 07] To receive testimony on threats and challenges...
description: Meeting for Subcommittee on Emerging Threats and Capabilities on October 7, 2025 at 10:30 AM
text:
Subcommittee on Emerging Threats and Capabilities
To receive testimony on threats and challenges posed to Department of Defense personnel and operations from adversarial access to publicly available data coupled with advanced data analysis tools now widely available on the commercial market
